RESPONSE TEXT: I will admit, when you ignored my invitation, I predicted... negative outcomes. But - you have a way of exceeding expectations, don't you?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Well enough. Let's have the Chip, then.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: We'll talk again once you've concluded your work in the bunker at Fortification Hill.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: What do you have to report about the Omertas?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Any progress with the Boomers?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Have you destroyed the Brotherhood of Steel?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: If not for you, President Kimball would be dead. So you needn't feel guilty when the NCR's rout from Hoover Dam demolishes his political career.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Kimball is dead - what a mess you've made!

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Until the Lucky 38's reactor has been restarted, we have nothing to discuss.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: The Legion's assault could begin at any moment.

TOPIC TEXT: Not so fast, Mr. House. We need to discuss payment.
RESPONSE TEXT: Fine - give me the Chip, and I'll pay you four times the delivery bonus stipulated in your contract. How's that?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the next step?
RESPONSE TEXT: The Legion has nothing left to wait for. Their assault on the dam could begin at any moment.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the next step?
RESPONSE TEXT: Before that happens, I'll ask you to complete one other task. It may seem trivial, but that's far from the case.

TOPIC TEXT: What was your relationship with Benny... back when he was breathing?
RESPONSE TEXT: Benny was the leader of the Chairmen for seven years, ever since I recruited the tribe. I considered him something of a protege.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Brotherhood of Steel has been wiped out.
RESPONSE TEXT: Singlehandedly destroying a Brotherhood of Steel bunker is quite an accomplishment. Platoons of NCR troops have died, trying to do the same.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Brotherhood of Steel has been wiped out.
RESPONSE TEXT: This welcome news comes just in time, as events in the wider world are coming to a head...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I have some questions to ask first...
RESPONSE TEXT: I'll be happy to satisfy your every curiosity once the Platinum Chip has been delivered.

TOPIC TEXT: for better terms.
PROMPT: It's a great start... but well below market price.
RESPONSE TEXT: Very well... five times your delivery bonus - not one cap more.

TOPIC TEXT: for better terms.
PROMPT: Raise your price or... or... you'll be "chip outta luck."
RESPONSE TEXT: Is that an attempt at... humor?

TOPIC TEXT: for better terms.
PROMPT: Raise your price or... or... you'll be "chip outta luck."
RESPONSE TEXT: I've always taken business negotiations seriously. I advise you to do the same.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Last I knew, President Kimball wasn't scheduled to visit the Lucky 38. Be on your way to Hoover Dam, will you?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Why in the world did you attack President Kimball?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I knew you'd make it. Resourceful, as always.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: The override module is functioning properly. I'm rerouting power to the Securitron vault at the Fort as we speak...

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I just need you to head over to the east power plant and manually activate the switch.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: When you return topside, I think you'll see that my Securitron army is a little more than the Legion was prepared to handle.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Oh, and before you go - grab that print-out spooling from the console here - those papers set the terms for the NCR's unconditional surrender.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I thought you might enjoy the honor of presenting them to the NCR's commanding officer, once the Legion has been defeated. Cheers!

TOPIC TEXT: It's not safe for me to go back. The Legion will attack me on sight.
RESPONSE TEXT: You'll need a disguise, then. Or overwhelming firepower. Whatever works.

TOPIC TEXT: It's not safe for me to go back. The Legion will attack me on sight.
RESPONSE TEXT: Sorry for the inconvenience, but it can't be helped. This is too important.

TOPIC TEXT: How do I open the hatch?
RESPONSE TEXT: You can't - but the Chip can. The hatch will recognize the Platinum Chip and "open sesame."

TOPIC TEXT: Goodbye.
RESPONSE TEXT: Well enough. Be on your way.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Goodbye.
RESPONSE TEXT: Goodbye.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Omertas who were conspiring against you are dead.
RESPONSE TEXT: Well done. They won't be causing any trouble, then.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I've secured their loyalty. They'll do as I say.
RESPONSE TEXT: Well done. The Boomers' firepower may prove an advantage when the battle for Hoover Dam comes around.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'm going to kill you now, Mr. House.
RESPONSE TEXT: After all that we've accomplished?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: It was an accident.
RESPONSE TEXT: Your "accident" has jeopardized the success of this entire concern.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I've done enough work for you.
RESPONSE TEXT: I offer many benefits, but vacation time isn't one of them.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Omertas were clever, but no match for me.
RESPONSE TEXT: Arrogance was their undoing. There might be a lesson in that. But moving on...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Let me think about it.
RESPONSE TEXT: There's nothing to think about. You have a job to do, so do it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: It's a good thing we stopped the Omertas in time.
RESPONSE TEXT: Indeed. Moving on...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: If I want more work, I'll come see you.
RESPONSE TEXT: You laid the foundation for my victory, so fine - I'll permit some latitude in how you schedule your work.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: If I want more work, I'll come see you.
RESPONSE TEXT: You're welcome.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I did my best, but the Legion did better.
RESPONSE TEXT: Your incompetence has jeopardized the success of this entire concern!

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I had to wipe out their leadership.
RESPONSE TEXT: There's more than one way to skin a cat, as the saying goes. Or went, that is - cats being extinct.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I had to wipe out their leadership.
RESPONSE TEXT: I don't promote political assassination as a first option, but it has a long and storied history. I'll consider the Boomers neutralized.

TOPIC TEXT: What do you want me to do?
RESPONSE TEXT: Simple - an NCR Ranger named Grant is in charge of security arrangements for the visit. Present yourself to him, let him know you want to help.

TOPIC TEXT: What do you want me to do?
RESPONSE TEXT: Given your reputation, it's a near-certainty that he'll accept your offer.

TOPIC TEXT: What do you want me to do?
RESPONSE TEXT: Don't dally. The precise time of Kimball's visit is a closely-guarded secret, but it will happen soon.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: When the Legion assaults the dam, the Brotherhood will attack the NCR and weaken them.
RESPONSE TEXT: Not surprising. Also not acceptable.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: When the Legion assaults the dam, the Brotherhood will attack the NCR and weaken them.
RESPONSE TEXT: I didn't ask you to tell me what they were planning, I asked you to kill them. This was a waste of time.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: When the Legion assaults the dam, the Brotherhood will attack the NCR and weaken them.
RESPONSE TEXT: Go back to the bunker and destroy it. My directions have been clear from the start.

TOPIC TEXT: I don't want to kill off the entire Brotherhood.
RESPONSE TEXT: Don't tell me that you've fallen for the stories of noble paladins on crusade, preserving mankind's technology in a benighted age? Dross!

TOPIC TEXT: I don't want to kill off the entire Brotherhood.
RESPONSE TEXT: In any case... this is an employer - employee relationship. I've given you an assignment, and the directions are clear.

TOPIC TEXT: Where do you want me to start?
RESPONSE TEXT: It's obvious that the Brotherhood has a base in Hidden Valley or thereabouts. Finding it won't be easy, but getting inside will be the real trick.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll make sure they support the right side.
RESPONSE TEXT: Use extreme caution when approaching the base. Their firepower is... considerable.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll make sure they support the right side.
RESPONSE TEXT: Recently, one of my roaming Securitrons observed a man near the base studying the pattern of its artillery fire. Maybe he's learned something.

TOPIC TEXT: I've already destroyed their bunker.
RESPONSE TEXT: You have?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: So Kimball's dead. So what?
RESPONSE TEXT: Every step of my plan has been precisely calculated and was, until now, well-executed.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the next step?
RESPONSE TEXT: Outside New Vegas, at what was once called Nellis Air Force Base, resides an unusual tribe known as the Boomers.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the next step?
RESPONSE TEXT: They are, shall we say, aggressively reclusive? They have several howitzers they fire at anyone who dares approach the base.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the next step?
RESPONSE TEXT: Artillery of this sort has a range of several miles. If it's going to fire on Hoover Dam, I want it firing at my targets.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the next step?
RESPONSE TEXT: If not, then I want to make sure that the Boomers don't sign similar treaties to fire their guns in support of the NCR or Caesar's Legion.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll check into the Omertas.
RESPONSE TEXT: The print-out I've given you lists every lead I've been able to uncover. See what you can find out.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'm still looking into it.
RESPONSE TEXT: Then look harder.

TOPIC TEXT: Any possibility of a diplomatic solution?
RESPONSE TEXT: We're talking about a coterie of bulging-eyed fanatics who think all Pre-War technology belongs to them.

TOPIC TEXT: Any possibility of a diplomatic solution?
RESPONSE TEXT: They'll never accept my using an army of robots to defend New Vegas. While it's a fight I can win, I'd rather sidestep it altogether.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Boomers and I don't get along. I'd rather keep my distance.
RESPONSE TEXT: It seems diplomacy is not your forte.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Boomers and I don't get along. I'd rather keep my distance.
RESPONSE TEXT: Given the strength of your past performance, I think we can let this go without further comment. I'm pulling you on to a new assignment.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I've come here to kill you, Mr. House. <Attack Mr. House.>
RESPONSE TEXT: Why is good help so impossible to find?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: My only regret is that he got away.
RESPONSE TEXT: Your impulsivity has jeopardized the success of this entire concern!

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: The foundation is laid. My Securitrons on the Strip are upgraded, and those at the Fort, ready for action.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Now it's just a matter of adjusting the attitudes of some lesser groups while we wait for Caesar's Legion to attack Hoover Dam.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: The next step is to add the Boomers' considerable firepower to my growing arsenal... or at the very least, ensure their neutrality.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Your next assignment won't take you far. It concerns the Omertas and their den of vice, Gomorrah.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: As the decisive encounter between the bull and the bear looms close, my concerns about the Omertas have grown.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I've never expected loyalty, mind you. A reliably underhanded tribe is just as constant to deal with as one that always run true.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: But that's just it - lately the Omertas' cooperative silence has been deafening. Not a single complaint? They're up to something.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Your next assignment would've been to investigate the Omertas, but you managed to foil their scheme before I could put you to the task.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I should compensate you as though it were an official assignment, however. Wouldn't want to disincentivize your proactivity.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Your next assignment is to locate and destroy remnants of the Mojave chapter of the Brotherhood of Steel.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: The NCR nearly did the job at Helios One a few years ago, but there seem to have been survivors, unfortunately.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Given the Brotherhood's fanatical views on technology, they can be counted on to oppose my regime.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Please - put them out of my misery.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Aaron Kimball, the president of the New California Republic, is going to visit Hoover Dam to "boost morale."

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Apparently he hasn't considered the effect on the troops' morale of seeing their beloved leader get his brains blown out by a Legion sniper.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Have you found the courage to do what's necessary?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'm done working for you.
RESPONSE TEXT: This is no time to be droll...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You want me to kill Caesar?
RESPONSE TEXT: Absolutely not! Caesar is of great use to me.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You want me to kill Caesar?
RESPONSE TEXT: I don't want you harming a hair on that man's head - assuming you can find one.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What is this place?
RESPONSE TEXT: It's a facility I built many years before you were born. You might think of it as a barracks. You'll understand soon enough.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Who are you, exactly?
RESPONSE TEXT: Surely you know that I am Robert Edwin House, President, CEO, and sole proprietor of the New Vegas Strip.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Who are you, exactly?
RESPONSE TEXT: I oversaw the city's renovations starting from 2274 onward. The Three Families are my employees.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Goodbye means goodbye.
RESPONSE TEXT: I've spent too many years waiting for this moment to see it fumbled by an insubordinate contractor.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Goodbye means goodbye.
RESPONSE TEXT: I can't reach through this monitor and compell you to follow instructions, but know this - if you disappoint me, you will pay for it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What will you do with your Securitrons?
RESPONSE TEXT: My army will do what an army does best - defend territory from invaders... and maintain order.

TOPIC TEXT: What happens next?
RESPONSE TEXT: A great deal shall be happening - a cascade of events, with you taking a central role.

TOPIC TEXT: What happens next?
RESPONSE TEXT: At the moment, however, all you need to do is take the elevator all the way down to the bottom level.

TOPIC TEXT: What happens next?
RESPONSE TEXT: What you see there will help you understand the significance of what you accomplished at the Fort.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was that you said about security systems?
RESPONSE TEXT: The same equipment failure that prevents me from remotely operating this facility seems to have activated its security robots and turrets.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was that you said about security systems?
RESPONSE TEXT: There's a security room near the base of the stairs... perhaps you can deactivate them yourself.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are you doing here?
RESPONSE TEXT: It is obvious to you that I built this place? The Platinum Chip opened it, after all?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are you doing here?
RESPONSE TEXT: In any case, you're here. So let's get to it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: We'll see what happens.
RESPONSE TEXT: I like to think you have enough sense to do the right thing. The rewards for doing so are immense... as are the punishments for not doing so.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Maybe I should destroy everything down here.
RESPONSE TEXT: I don't respond well to threats. Now, where were we...?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What if I destroy all three?
RESPONSE TEXT: The bunker will be destroyed, and you'll die instantly.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <Use Barter to negotiate for higher reward.>
PROMPT: This work sounds important - and expensive.
RESPONSE TEXT: Fine, you'll receive a nice bonus when the work is done. And speaking of getting it done...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <Use Barter to negotiate for higher reward.>
PROMPT: I could use a raise!
RESPONSE TEXT: You signed a contract to deliver the Platinum Chip, and you'll be paid when the delivery is made.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Goodbye.
RESPONSE TEXT: Goodbye? Is that some kind of joke? You barely understand what I want you to accomplish down there.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <Lie> I'm not sure what happened to it.
RESPONSE TEXT: Are you a child? The Platinum Chip was taken from you, obviously.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Legion took it from me at the Fort.
RESPONSE TEXT: So what are you doing here? Return to the Fort at once.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Legion took it from me at the Fort.
RESPONSE TEXT: Recover the Platinum Chip. Once you've entered the bunker hidden beneath the weather station, you'll receive further instructions.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'm going to do as Caesar asks and blow everything up down here.
RESPONSE TEXT: Listen to me, very carefully. I've waited too long for this moment for you to go fouling it up on a lark.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'm going to do as Caesar asks and blow everything up down here.
RESPONSE TEXT: Do as I say, and your rewards will be immense. Thwart me, and your punishment will become the purpose of my existence.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What is this place?
RESPONSE TEXT: It's a facility I built many years before you were born. You might think of it as a kind of barracks. You'll understand soon enough.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Caesar will kill me unless he believes I blew something up down here.
RESPONSE TEXT: I see - you're in a predicament.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Caesar will kill me unless he believes I blew something up down here.
RESPONSE TEXT: Just off the turbine room down below are three power regulators. It's a redundant system - only one is needed.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Caesar will kill me unless he believes I blew something up down here.
RESPONSE TEXT: Go ahead and destroy one. The explosion will be large enough to be heard and felt aboveground.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll upload the data, as you ask.
RESPONSE TEXT: Good. I won't hold you up any longer.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Nope, I'm going to blow it all up anyways.
RESPONSE TEXT: Then there will be no safe haven for you.

TOPIC TEXT: What does the Chip do, exactly?
RESPONSE TEXT: Yes, so far as you've seen, all it does is change the picture on the Securitrons' face screens from policemen to soldiers. But as you'll see...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Caesar wants me to destroy this place.
RESPONSE TEXT: Was that meant to be a shocking revelation? Of course Caesar wants it destroyed - he's afraid of what the bunker might hold, and rightly so.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Caesar wants me to destroy this place.
RESPONSE TEXT: But you're not going to do that. You're going to do the smart thing, and work for me.

TOPIC TEXT: I'll be on my way, then...
RESPONSE TEXT: I must insist that you stay long for me to show you that the Platinum Chip does more than change the pictures on the Securitrons' face screens.

TOPIC TEXT: I'll be on my way, then...
RESPONSE TEXT: Events of great import are about to unfold, with you taking a central role. To get started, all you need do is take the elevator all the way down...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What makes you think Caesar gave me the Chip?
RESPONSE TEXT: The Platinum Chip unlocks this bunker. Hence, you have it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What makes you think Caesar gave me the Chip?
RESPONSE TEXT: Hence, Benny was captured or killed - possibly by you, but by my estimates, far more probably by Caesar's Legion. Hence, Caesar gave you the Chip.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What makes you think Caesar gave me the Chip?
RESPONSE TEXT: Hence, Caesar wants you to destroy whatever you find in this bunker.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What makes you think Caesar gave me the Chip?
RESPONSE TEXT: That you were searched very thoroughly when you arrived at the Fort is a certainty. And as the Chip is a little too large to be secreted away...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What makes you think Caesar gave me the Chip?
RESPONSE TEXT: I also regard it a certainty that the Chip was discovered, taken from you, and given to Caesar - who returned it to you.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What makes you think Caesar gave me the Chip?
RESPONSE TEXT: Two plus two equaling four, Caesar wants you to destroy whatever you find in this bunker.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What makes you think Caesar gave me the Chip?
RESPONSE TEXT: But that's not going to happen, because you're going to work for me.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I do wish you'd come and met with me at the Lucky 38 when you first arrived on the Strip. Or after Benny fled, even.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I do wish you'd come and met with me at the Lucky 38 when you first arrived on the Strip. Or after you killed Benny, even.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Quite an honor you spurned, my invite. You would be the first person to set foot inside the Lucky 38 in over 200 years.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: But... you still wound up here, right where I wanted you. I knew I could rely on Caesar to return the Platinum Chip to you.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Well! You're here ahead of schedule! I suppose it's just as well...

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: This is where I wanted you to end up, after all. I knew I could rely on Caesar to give you back the Platinum Chip.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I see that you reached your destination safely. Shall we get to work?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Stop wasting time. Go upload the data on the Platinum Chip to the facility's primary computer.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: As you know, the Platinum Chip upgrades my Securitrons' operating software. Well... there's an army of them here.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: The Securitrons policing the Strip are a fraction of the total number manufactured. The rest, I stored here.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: The Platinum Chip is a data-storage device.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I need you to manually upload the data from the Chip to the facility's primary computer. There's a terminal at the other end of this facility.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: There's a complication. While I can broadcast to this screen, I can't control any of the facility's systems.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: That means I can't deactivate its security bots... most of which appear to be active, according to the status board I'm looking at.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Do you have the slightest idea of what you've done, of what you've destroyed?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: You've doomed Vegas to be ruled by corrupt bureaucrats or fanatical savages.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Singlehandedly, you've brought mankind's best hopes of forward progress crashing down. No punishment would be too severe.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Your work here is done. Return to the Lucky 38 so we can discuss next steps.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: You have a very bright future ahead of you. Thanks to your actions today, so does the rest of mankind.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Before we go any further - where is the Platinum Chip?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: So, we meet in person finally... so to speak. You did well at the Fort - kudos.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Events have transpired in a... less-than-optimal fashion. Benny has fled the Strip, and the Platinum Chip has not been recovered.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: So... Benny has been handled and you've recovered the Platinum Chip. Let's have it.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: There will be no repeat of the trouble we had last time, I trust?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I'm optimistic that this conversation will go more smoothly.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Not interested.
RESPONSE TEXT: Not interested? Not interested?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Not interested.
RESPONSE TEXT: You have an interest in this even if you're too stupid to know it. If you have an interest in breathing, you have an interest in this.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Not interested.
RESPONSE TEXT: Return to the Fort and do whatever it takes to recover the Chip.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll do as you say.
RESPONSE TEXT: That would make for a welcome change.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You're asking me to commit suicide. The Legion will attack me on sight.
RESPONSE TEXT: Then gather together the firepower or explosives or whatever else you need and improvise.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You're asking me to commit suicide. The Legion will attack me on sight.
RESPONSE TEXT: I don't care if you have to kill every Legionary at the Fort. Get the job done.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Have you come to your senses? It's not too late to upload the Platinum Chip's data to the primary computer.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Make your way to Caesar's Camp at Fortification Hill. Something very interesting awaits you...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'm still working on it.
RESPONSE TEXT: I'll expect to see some tangible progress before long, then.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I worked out a deal where the Brotherhood will help the NCR defend the dam.
RESPONSE TEXT: And why would you have done that?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I worked out a deal where the Brotherhood will help the NCR defend the dam.
RESPONSE TEXT: Success depends on forcing the NCR to rout from Hoover Dam. Hmm, does giving then a powerful ally in the battle make that more or less likely?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I worked out a deal where the Brotherhood will help the NCR defend the dam.
RESPONSE TEXT: Your assignment is unchanged - destroy the Brotherhood of Steel. Please get it right this time.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Who are you to tell me what to do?
RESPONSE TEXT: I'm the person who will pay you when you complete the delivery contract you signed. Now go get the Chip.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: He set me up for an ambush!
RESPONSE TEXT: And whose idea was it to offer yourself up as a sacrificial lamb? Really, what did you expect?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: He set me up for an ambush!
RESPONSE TEXT: Are you going to keep giving him opportunities to kill you? It's becoming a hobby of his.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Goodbye.
RESPONSE TEXT: By "goodbye," I assume you mean to say that you can't talk right now because you need to go get the Platinum Chip off Benny's body.

TOPIC TEXT: I have some questions to ask first...
RESPONSE TEXT: This is not the time for Q&A. Kindly hand over the Chip.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'm still working on it.
RESPONSE TEXT: Hidden Valley is the place to keep working, then.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll go get the Platinum Chip.
RESPONSE TEXT: Excellent idea.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Were you aware that he hijacked a Securitron and used it to infiltrate your network?
RESPONSE TEXT: I suspected he'd found a way to access my encrypted databases, but well - this explains it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Were you aware that he hijacked a Securitron and used it to infiltrate your network?
RESPONSE TEXT: That would be how he learned of the Platinum Chip in the first place... not to mention where to intercept you, on your way in.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Were you aware that he hijacked a Securitron and used it to infiltrate your network?
RESPONSE TEXT: Highly resourceful, Benny. He would've made a fine agent, had he stayed loyal. It's fortunate you came along to replace him - and ironic.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Boomers.
RESPONSE TEXT: They occupied Nellis Air Force Base a little over 50 years ago. One of my Securitrons got some video of their arrival - and then... exploded.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Boomers.
RESPONSE TEXT: Odds are they were Vault dwellers. That's everything I know about them, really.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Boomers.
PROMPT: The Boomers sound dangerous.
RESPONSE TEXT: Only if you come within a mile or so of them.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Boomers.
PROMPT: The Boomers sound dangerous.
RESPONSE TEXT: Given their history of extreme isolationism, it's tempting to leave them be. But those howitzers of theirs...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Boomers.
PROMPT: The Boomers sound dangerous.
RESPONSE TEXT: You can't let indeterminate variables rattle around in your equations like that. They have to be accounted for, one way or another.

TOPIC TEXT: I have some questions to ask first...
RESPONSE TEXT: This is not the time for Q&A. Kindly hand over the Chip.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What about Benny?
RESPONSE TEXT: What about him? He has every reason to go to the Fort, so that's where you'll find him.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What about Benny?
RESPONSE TEXT: All I ask is that you recover the Chip. What happens to Benny is up to you.

TOPIC TEXT: I have some questions to ask first...
RESPONSE TEXT: This is not the time for Q&A. Kindly hand over the Chip.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You recruited the Omertas as one of the Three Families?
RESPONSE TEXT: Yes, though at the time they called themselves the "Slither Kin." A vicious clan, not that that's changed, exactly.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You recruited the Omertas as one of the Three Families?
RESPONSE TEXT: They were nomads, capable fighters, but their specialty was betrayal. They'd invite travelers into their yurts, drug them, murder or enslave them.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You recruited the Omertas as one of the Three Families?
RESPONSE TEXT: They took pride in their craft. I don't think Omertas saw other people as people at all. Everyone else was just... prey.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You recruited the Omertas as one of the Three Families?
RESPONSE TEXT: They reminded me of a certain criminal element Vegas used to attract. I told them some stories, gave them some clothes - and they ran with it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You recruited the Omertas as one of the Three Families?
PROMPT: What were the original names of the other tribes?
RESPONSE TEXT: The Chairmen, as we know them now, went by the unfortunate appellation of the "Mojave Boot-Riders." They were nomads, too.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You recruited the Omertas as one of the Three Families?
PROMPT: What were the original names of the other tribes?
RESPONSE TEXT: As for the White Glove Society, I afraid I'm contractually obligated not to reveal their original name.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Goodbye.
RESPONSE TEXT: Come back when you have something to report.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Where do you think Benny's gone?
RESPONSE TEXT: His destination is hardly a mystery. It's a near certainty that he's making his way for Caesar's camp, at Fortification Hill.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Where do you think Benny's gone?
RESPONSE TEXT: It's one of just two places on Earth that have the hardware necessary to read the Platinum Chip  - the Lucky 38 is the other, of course.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Brotherhood of Steel.
RESPONSE TEXT: They're a terrorist group, basically. Militant, quasi-religious fanatics obsessed with hoarding Pre-War technology.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Brotherhood of Steel.
RESPONSE TEXT: Not all technology, mind you. You don't see them raiding hospitals to cart away Auto-Docs or armfuls of prosthetic organs.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Brotherhood of Steel.
RESPONSE TEXT: No, they greatly prefer the sort of technology that puts people in hospitals. Or graves, rather, since hospitals went the way of the Dodo.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Brotherhood of Steel.
PROMPT: Why do you hate the Brotherhood so much?
RESPONSE TEXT: Because they're ridiculous! Because they galavant around the Mojave pretending to be Knights of Yore.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Brotherhood of Steel.
PROMPT: Why do you hate the Brotherhood so much?
RESPONSE TEXT: Or did, until the NCR showed them that ideological purity and shiny power armor don't count for much when you're outnumbered 15:1.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Tell me about the Brotherhood of Steel.
PROMPT: Why do you hate the Brotherhood so much?
RESPONSE TEXT: The world has no use for emotionally unstable techno-fetishists. Just wipe them out, will you?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: You would go to war against the NCR?
RESPONSE TEXT: The salient issue is that they will go to war with me, if given the chance.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: You would go to war against the NCR?
RESPONSE TEXT: There's just one reason why the NCR hasn't contrived some outrage to justify invading the Strip - Caesar's Legion.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: You would go to war against the NCR?
RESPONSE TEXT: The final battle between those two armies is fast approaching. I can't afford to let either side win on their terms.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
RESPONSE TEXT: I care because he is a known quantity - not the man so much as the political context he inhabits.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
RESPONSE TEXT: Kimball rose to prominence as the "Hero of the Mojave" when he led a campaign of reprisals against tribals who dared to attack NCR citizens.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
RESPONSE TEXT: Ordering the occupation of Hoover Dam was his first act of office. As water and electricity flowed to NCR cities, his popularity soared.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
RESPONSE TEXT: Conversely, his failure to annex the Mojave these seven years, and the immense costs of occupying a foreign land, have eroded his popular support.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
PROMPT: So why don't you want the NCR President to die?
RESPONSE TEXT: Kimball's entire political career is inextricably bound up with the NCR's occupation of the Mojave. It's his war.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
PROMPT: So why don't you want the NCR President to die?
RESPONSE TEXT: If I compell the NCR to retreat, Kimball will be the sacrifice offered to the gods, so decent NCR citizens can get on with their lives.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
PROMPT: So why don't you want the NCR President to die?
RESPONSE TEXT: In retrospect, the Mojave and Hoover Dam will seem like one man's misadventure. Kimball will be blamed, not me. Not New Vegas.

TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
RESPONSE TEXT: It was a place of splendor. As magnificent as today's Strip may seem, it's but a shadow of the neon paradise that was Las Vegas.

TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
RESPONSE TEXT: I grew up not far from here, and though I traveled the old world extensively, I never found another place like it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: You say that you saved Las Vegas. How?
RESPONSE TEXT: By 2065 I deemed it a mathematical certainty that an atomic war would devastate the Earth within 15 years. Every projection I ran confirmed it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: You say that you saved Las Vegas. How?
RESPONSE TEXT: I knew I couldn't "save the world," nor did I care to. But I could save Vegas, and in the process, perhaps, save mankind.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: You say that you saved Las Vegas. How?
RESPONSE TEXT: I set to work immediately. I thought I had plenty of time to prepare. As it turned out, I was 20 hours short.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: What preparations did you make to save Las Vegas?
RESPONSE TEXT: On the day of the Great War, 77 atomic warheads targeted Las Vegas and its surrounding areas.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: What preparations did you make to save Las Vegas?
RESPONSE TEXT: My networked mainframes were able to predict and force-transmit disarm code subsets to 59 warheads, neutralizing them before impact.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: What preparations did you make to save Las Vegas?
RESPONSE TEXT: Laser cannons mounted on the roof of the Lucky 38 destroyed another 9 warheads. The rest got through, though none hit the city itself.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: What preparations did you make to save Las Vegas?
RESPONSE TEXT: A sub-optimal performance, admittedly. If only the Platinum Chip had arrived a day sooner...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: Why didn't the Platinum Chip arrive on time?
RESPONSE TEXT: The Platinum Chip was printed in Sunnyvale, California on October 22nd, 2077 - the day before the Great War.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: Why didn't the Platinum Chip arrive on time?
RESPONSE TEXT: It was to have been delivered by courier the following afternoon... but by then, the world had ended.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: Why didn't the Platinum Chip arrive on time?
RESPONSE TEXT: The Chip contained vital software upgrades, but not just for my Securitrons. Every aspect of the missile defense grid would have been upgraded, too.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: Why didn't the Platinum Chip arrive on time?
RESPONSE TEXT: Given that I had to make do with buggy software, the outcome could have been worse. I nearly died as it was.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Not interested. Good luck getting the Chip back.
RESPONSE TEXT: As I've told you before, you are contractually obligated to deliver the Chip. Do your job - you have everything to gain.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll check into the Omertas.
RESPONSE TEXT: The Omertas are fanatically loyal to each other. Still, among any group, one can find the occasional degenerate.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll check into the Omertas.
RESPONSE TEXT: Gomorrah's receptionist happens to be one. For years she passed on whispers of what was taking place at the casino, in exchange for payment.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll check into the Omertas.
RESPONSE TEXT: A few months ago, she clammed up. Odds are she's scared, but I've had no way of approaching her. Start with her.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I've found evidence of an Omerta plot.
RESPONSE TEXT: I don't employ you to uncover evidence. This isn't a court of law.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I've found evidence of an Omerta plot.
RESPONSE TEXT: If the Omertas pose a threat to the physical or economic security of the Vegas Strip, I want you to do whatever it takes to neutralize that threat.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
RESPONSE TEXT: Imagine two snarling dogs fighting over a curve of bone, perhaps the rib of their master, long-dead.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
RESPONSE TEXT: It'll be a pitched battle, that's a certainty. Perhaps the greatest battle the Earth has seen since the human race nearly made itself extinct.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
PROMPT: Any speculation on Legion tactics?
RESPONSE TEXT: With Caesar dead, it's hard to know what to expect. The Legate, Lanius, is renowned as a brutal man, not a subtle tactician.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
PROMPT: Any speculation on Legion tactics?
RESPONSE TEXT: Frontal assaults, wave attacks - these are the sort of tactics one would expect from such a man.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
PROMPT: Any speculation on Legion tactics?
RESPONSE TEXT: The Legion will mount a ferocious and determined frontal assault from the east, that much is certain.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
PROMPT: Any speculation on Legion tactics?
RESPONSE TEXT: Still, Caesar is a capable strategist. I'd be surprised if he hasn't found some way to infiltrate the dam, or the NCR's rear areas.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'd like to ask some questions first...
RESPONSE TEXT: There will time for questions and answers once you've delivered the Chip. Until then, you'll have to tolerate your ignorance... just as I do.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Benny is dead, and yet you don't appear to be carrying the Platinum Chip.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I don't suppose you forgot to search his body?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: The point of my inviting you to visit me here at the Lucky 38 before stomping into the Tops on your own was to help you prepare - tactically.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Now, because of your carelessness, Benny has fled the Strip, taking with him the Platinum Chip.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I need you to make sure that no harm comes to President Kimball. It's fortunate that you've maintained good relations with the NCR...

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Unfortunately, I can't use you to protect Kimball. The NCR won't let you come within a thousand feet of the President.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Odds are that Caesar will launch his assault on the dam after Kimball's visit is concluded, one way or the other - so be on guard.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Your reputation with the NCR isn't exactly stellar, so I'll have to vouche for you. It'll make a scene, but it's worth it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Like I said, I'll think about it.
RESPONSE TEXT: You're making me question your usefulness, you realize.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Vouche for me? How?
RESPONSE TEXT: I'll send a Securitron ahead to meet with the NCR at the security checkpoint and get things started.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Vouche for me? How?
RESPONSE TEXT: Once you get there ask for Ranger Grant. I've used roaming Securitrons to feed him useful information in the past.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Vouche for me? How?
RESPONSE TEXT: If I tell him we've heard of a Legion assassination plot, I believe he'll let you investigate.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Sure, off to the dam I go.
RESPONSE TEXT: I'm sure the assassins will wait for you to show up.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Whatever happens, happens.
RESPONSE TEXT: Success depends on forethought, dispassionate calculation of probabilites, accounting for every stray variable.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Whatever happens, happens.
RESPONSE TEXT: Your history of aggression towards the NCR has rendered you useless in this concern, unable to influence the outcome of events.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Whatever happens, happens.
RESPONSE TEXT: Consequently, I have to "wait and see" what happens. It's... grotesque.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I think I'll sit this one out.
RESPONSE TEXT: This is not an optional assignment. Kimball may be a grandstanding boor, but I want him protected.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: As I was saying, I need you to enlist or neutralize the Boomers at Nellis Air Force Base.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: As I said before, I need you to investigate the Omertas, to see what they're up to.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: As I've said, I need you to locate and destroy the Brotherhood of Steel.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Will you ensure that President Kimball survives his visit to Hoover Dam?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I'd rather you just dealt with the Boomers, but all right...

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I suppose the Omertas can wait a few minutes.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: A few questions, and then you'll handle the Brotherhood, I hope?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Questions like "Will President Kimball survive his visit to Hoover Dam?"

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Even now? On the brink of battle?

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Unfortunately, I can't very well send you off to protect Kimball. The NCR won't let you come within a thousand feet of the President.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: This can be used to our advantage, though it'll a grim business. Go to Hoover Dam and attack the gathering crowd, and his visit will be canceled.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: No thanks.
RESPONSE TEXT: Not so eager to take on a suicide mission, is that it? If you'd shown moderation in your dealings with the NCR, we wouldn't be in this position.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Seriously, I'm not interested.
RESPONSE TEXT: Until you do this, consider yourself suspended... without pay.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I had my reasons.
RESPONSE TEXT: Whatever those reasons may be, you've jeopardized the success of this entire concern.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <Speech to lie to Mr. House about RACKET involvement.>
PROMPT: I infiltrated the Omertas in order to gain their confidence.
RESPONSE TEXT: In that case, I commend you for your initiative. What do you recommend for next steps?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <Speech to lie to Mr. House about RACKET involvement.>
PROMPT: Well, thing is... I, uh... they tried to involve me...
RESPONSE TEXT: And you assisted them? That's what you mean to say, isn't it?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Wait for them to make their move. Forewarned is forearmed.
RESPONSE TEXT: I suppose you're right... When the Legion assaults Hoover Dam, my Securitrons will be waiting for the Omertas. They won't accomplish much.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll be leaving, then.
RESPONSE TEXT: Oh no, not so quick. I still have work for you.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's this about a dormant reactor?
RESPONSE TEXT: The strain of defending Las Vegas from annhilation exceeded my power systems' capacity. My primary reactor shut down.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's this about a dormant reactor?
RESPONSE TEXT: For years, I played a miser with my emergency power supply. I began to run out of reserves around the time I woke the first batch of Securitrons.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's this about a dormant reactor?
RESPONSE TEXT: Negotiating an allotment of power from Hoover Dam was crucial. That's what's powered the Strip for the past seven years.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: When the Legion assaults Hoover Dam, the Omertas are going to massacre everyone on the Strip.
RESPONSE TEXT: And how do you know this?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why didn't you restart the reactor earlier?
RESPONSE TEXT: I needed the operating software on the Platinum Chip to bring it back online.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why didn't you restart the reactor earlier?
RESPONSE TEXT: And to start the reactor itself requires a tremendous jolt of current. Very attention-getting.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why didn't you restart the reactor earlier?
RESPONSE TEXT: The NCR has its hands full now, of course. I doubt they'll raise much of a fuss.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You wanted me to come down here?
RESPONSE TEXT: That's rather obvious, isn't it?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Send your Securitrons into Gomorrah and kill off the Omertas' leaders.
RESPONSE TEXT: Exactly how many civilians did you want to die in that crossfire?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Send your Securitrons into Gomorrah and kill off the Omertas' leaders.
RESPONSE TEXT: Still, you raise a fair point. My Securitrons can handle this. When the Legion attacks Hoover Dam, I'll be waiting for the Omertas.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Brotherhood is holed up in Hidden Valley.
RESPONSE TEXT: You're absolutely right. You must've had run-ins with them. As have I...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
PROMPT: And if Kimball were to be assassinated?
RESPONSE TEXT: Then the Hero of the Mojave would become the Martyr of Hoover Dam. And when, subsequently, I force the NCR to retreat...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
PROMPT: And if Kimball were to be assassinated?
RESPONSE TEXT: They lick their wounds, and dream of righteous vengeance against New Vegas. Hello, embargo, farewell, tourist economy.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do you care whether Kimball lives or dies?
PROMPT: And if Kimball were to be assassinated?
RESPONSE TEXT: I've calculated and re-calculated these probabilities. Kimball must live.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: There nothing I can do to protect Kimball?
RESPONSE TEXT: I can't use you. Had you shown moderation in your dealings with the NCR, we'd be in a different position.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: It was an accident.
RESPONSE TEXT: Up to this point, your efforts yielded near-perfect results. But now I'm forced to fumble in the dark - to gamble.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: It was an accident.
RESPONSE TEXT: Light must be brought to this darkness.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Any recommendations on how to complete the mission?
RESPONSE TEXT: From time to time, the NCR has assaulted Brotherhood bunkers. In four of the six incidents I know of, the bunkers self-destructed.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Any recommendations on how to complete the mission?
RESPONSE TEXT: I surmise it's standard practice for the Brotherhood to install a self-destruct system. It's consistent with their uncompromising nature.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Any recommendations on how to complete the mission?
RESPONSE TEXT: You might use that against them. Or kill them another way, it's up to you. Return when it's done.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I may know something about that...
RESPONSE TEXT: You'll have to be more specific.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The Omertas had it coming.
RESPONSE TEXT: An opinion you expressed with supreme subtlety and finesse. Moving on...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Where do you want me to start?
RESPONSE TEXT: Since 2278, I've lost five roaming Securitrons near Hidden Valley.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Where do you want me to start?
RESPONSE TEXT: I didn't receive any clear video of the incidents, but telemetry from the units destroyed indicates they were attacked with energy weapons.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Nothing I can do. Trying to stop them would be a suicide mission.
RESPONSE TEXT: Can't put the genie back in the bottle, is that it? Maybe you should've thought of that before you conspired to destroy my property.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Nothing I can do. Trying to stop them would be a suicide mission.
RESPONSE TEXT: That said, I'd know nothing of the Omertas' plot if you'd kept it secret. Perhaps I owe you my gratitude, after all...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Nothing I can do. Trying to stop them would be a suicide mission.
RESPONSE TEXT: The information you've provided will suffice. When the battle for Hoover Dam comes, I'll make sure my Securitrons are waiting for the Omertas.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <Use Speech to deny responsibility.>
PROMPT: I was set up. The Legion used me as a patsy.
RESPONSE TEXT: They knew you were coming? They were better prepared than I anticipated, then. I won't underestimate them again.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <Use Speech to deny responsibility.>
PROMPT: I was set up. The Legion used me as a patsy.
RESPONSE TEXT: Before that happens, I'd ask you to complete one final task. It may seem trivial, but that's far from the case.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <Use Speech to deny responsibility.>
PROMPT: It... it wasn't Kimball, it was an imposter. It had to die!
RESPONSE TEXT: Whatever your reasons, you've jeopardized the success of this entire concern!

TOPIC TEXT: I'll do as you ask.
RESPONSE TEXT: I expect that if Benny doesn't have the Chip, Caesar will make sure you get it. More on that later. Be off.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Do I need to remind you that the NCR hates me?
RESPONSE TEXT: No cause for alarm - you'll have an escort of Securitrons to help you fight your way onto the dam.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Goodbye.
RESPONSE TEXT: Come back when your work at the substation is done.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I kind of helped them perfect their plan...
RESPONSE TEXT: I see. So where does that put us?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You already have power. Why is this important?
RESPONSE TEXT: This is not a good time to be dependent on energy from Hoover Dam. When the Legion attacks, the NCR may cut power altogether.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You already have power. Why is this important?
RESPONSE TEXT: And I'll be needing a good deal more power than the NCR has allotted to the Strip.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You already have power. Why is this important?
RESPONSE TEXT: Broadcasting encrypted VMQ-boosted command signals to hundreds of Securitrons eats up more power than you might expect.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll do it.
RESPONSE TEXT: Don't attack unless there are clear signs that Kimball's visit is imminent. Cause enough chaos to cancel the visit, no more. Then return to me.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What more could I have done?
RESPONSE TEXT: You could've succeeded!

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: No thanks.
RESPONSE TEXT: I much prefer working with robots...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll be on my way.
RESPONSE TEXT: There's a job that needs doing here, and I'm assigning it to you.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll be on my way.
RESPONSE TEXT: Marvellous work ethic, bravo.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll take care of it.
RESPONSE TEXT: With this accomplished, all preparations will have been made. The battle for Hoover Dam will be upon us before long.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Benny must be pursued, and the Platinum Chip, recovered.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I'd hoped to have you investigate the Omertas, but after the trouble you caused at Gomorrah, they won't let you in the front door.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I'll see if I can make some progress with informants. You're useless in this matter.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Between the Strip and HELIOS One lies the El Dorado electrical substation.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Humble as it appears, the substation has immense strategic value, for it's there that you'll jumpstart the Lucky 38's dormant reactor.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Gain access to the substation's control room and install this override module. Just so you know, there are NCR troops guarding the station.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: As you can see, Vegas is humming along. I've tested my c3i broadcasting arrays. Everything is in order.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: And just in time, as it turns out. The forces of Caesar's Legion are on the march, establishing a staging area east of the dam.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Their assault could begin at any moment. So that's where you'll be heading, if you're ready - Hoover Dam.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Sounds like I get to kill lots of Legionaries.
RESPONSE TEXT: Indeed you will. Just bear in mind that's not the reason you're there.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the goal?
RESPONSE TEXT: Your objective is to reach a control room halfway across the dam and install an override module similar to the one you used at the Substation.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the goal?
RESPONSE TEXT: The override will enable to control the entire dam's power output.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the goal?
RESPONSE TEXT: You may remember how the bunker at the Fort was rather dimly lit? Well, just like the Lucky 38, it needs a big jolt of electricity to power up.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the goal?
RESPONSE TEXT: You've already uploaded the new operating system to the Securitrons. All they need is power and they'll be in fighting trim.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why do I need to be there? The NCR has an army.
RESPONSE TEXT: Indeed they do - an army that'll be too distracted with killing Legionaries to notice the real reason you're there.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: The NCR will welcome my help.
RESPONSE TEXT: Precisely. You'll have no trouble joining the battle on their side, and they'll be too distracted to notice why you're really there.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: How did you nearly die, defending Vegas?
RESPONSE TEXT: Software glitches set off a cascade of system crashes. I had to take the Lucky 38's reactor offline, lest it melt down.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: How did you nearly die, defending Vegas?
RESPONSE TEXT: For nearly five years I battled power outages and more system crashes until I finally managed to reboot my data core with an older version of the OS.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What was Vegas like before the war?
PROMPT: How did you nearly die, defending Vegas?
RESPONSE TEXT: I spent the next few decades in a veritable coma. But I survived, obviously - and eventually thrived.
Step closer to the demonstration area, if you would...

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseLastWillTestament
RESPONSE TEXT: If this statement is being broadcast, I am deceased. Please approach a Securitron and take one of the printed obituaries.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseFirstTalk
RESPONSE TEXT: Hello.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseFirstTalk
RESPONSE TEXT: Come over and introduce yourself.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseFirstTalk
RESPONSE TEXT: Come now, don't keep me waiting.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseFirstTalk
RESPONSE TEXT: I invited you here so we could talk, not so you can nose around.
I expect you're well familiar with my Securitrons by now.
The titanium alloy housing that protects its electronic core deflects small arms and shrapnel easily enough...
Its X-25 gatling laser, produced to spec by Glastinghouse, Inc., is deadly  against soft targets at medium range...
And for close-range suppression or crowd control, the Securitron is armed with a 9mm submachinegun.
All of this, you probably already knew...
What you did not know is that these are the Securitrons' secondary weapons.
All this time, my Securitrons have had to get by running the Mark I operating system, which lacked software drivers for their primary weapons!
The M-235 Missile Launcher gives the Securitron the ability to engage ground and air targets at significantly longer ranges...
And a rapid-fire G-28 grenade launching system ensures the Securitron is deadly in close-range engagements.
The software upgrade also includes drivers for the Securitrons' highly sophisticated onboard auto-repair systems.
The city of New Vegas finally has soldiers worthy of protecting it!
Return to the penthouse now. We have much to discuss...

TOPIC TEXT: The NCR asked me to get rid of you.
RESPONSE TEXT: Those snakes? ...for them? ...you sad, misguided... whore.

TOPIC TEXT: Yes Man needs you out of the way.
RESPONSE TEXT: Your... vanity project... doomed to fail...

TOPIC TEXT: Time for you to die, Mr. House.
RESPONSE TEXT: May there be... a hell... for you... a Tartarus...  bleak, unending...

TOPIC TEXT: You won't be able to control anything, but I'll let you live.
RESPONSE TEXT: No! ...Don't disable... cerebral... I'd rather be... killed... just kill... me...

TOPIC TEXT: It's just business.
RESPONSE TEXT: If personal gain... what you sought... should've done... as asked...

TOPIC TEXT: By Caesar's command, you will die.
RESPONSE TEXT: Slavery... the future of... mankind? What... have you... done?

TOPIC TEXT: I don't like you.
RESPONSE TEXT: Fool... to let... personalities... derail future... of mankind? ...Stupid!

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <WGS cannibalism>
PROMPT: Did you know I killed some White Gloves who were eating their customers?
RESPONSE TEXT: Cannibalism was strictly forbidden in their contract. If some of them broke that stricture, they deserved whatever punishment you dealt them.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <WGS cannibalism>
PROMPT: Did you know some of the White Gloves are... eating people again?
RESPONSE TEXT: No, I was not aware of this.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <WGS cannibalism>
PROMPT: Did you know some of the White Gloves are... eating people again?
RESPONSE TEXT: Is it really so hard not to engage in cannibalism? My goodness...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <WGS cannibalism>
PROMPT: Did you know some of the White Gloves are... eating people again?
RESPONSE TEXT: It's a violation of their contract. I authorize you to deal with them in any way you see fit.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <WGS cannibalism>
PROMPT: Were you aware that the White Glove Society used to be cannibals?
RESPONSE TEXT: Yes, of course. But refraining from those "dietary practices" is a primary requirement of their contract.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <WGS cannibalism>
PROMPT: Were you aware that the White Glove Society used to be cannibals?
RESPONSE TEXT: They've been good to their word. Put together one hell of a resort hotel, too.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: <WGS cannibalism>
PROMPT: Were you aware that the White Glove Society used to be cannibals?
RESPONSE TEXT: From what I hear, I'd want to eat at the Gourmand every night... if I were ambulatory.

TOPIC TEXT: I'll put you back in your tube, good as new.
RESPONSE TEXT: No... ruined everything... exposed... germs... a year of... life, if... at most...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the deal with the snowglobe collection?
RESPONSE TEXT: What of it? I enjoy them. There's something about a little diorama set inside a glass dome that I... find pleasing.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the deal with the snowglobe collection?
RESPONSE TEXT: If you run across any out in the wastes, turn them in to Jane. She'll compensate you.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You do know Caesar is dead, don't you?
RESPONSE TEXT: By my calculations, his death will affect the shape of the battle for Hoover Dam minimally, if at all.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You do know Caesar is dead, don't you?
RESPONSE TEXT: The Legion's aggression will outlive Caesar. Indeed, they'll try to take the dam as a tribute to his memory.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You do know Caesar is dead, don't you?
RESPONSE TEXT: Given a year, they'd have him deified - but by then the Legion will be breaking down, riven by internal conflicts, a monster consuming itself.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: You do know Caesar is dead, don't you?
RESPONSE TEXT: It's irrelevant. In the short term, the Legion is still monster enough that defeating it will make me look powerful indeed.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: Why have you... done this?... centuries of preparation... so much good, undone...

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: I have... nothing... to say... to you...

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseControlPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Hold on, now, hold on. Just a moment...

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseControlPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Turn around and leave, and I'll... I won't attack you any further.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseControlPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Just... stay away from the console. It doesn't do anything...

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseControlPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: You've come back to kill me this time, I assume?

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseControlPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Ironic, how this turned out. The thousands of hours I spent calculating odds, running projections, planning for every contingency...

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseControlPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: ...only to be done in by a mail carrier with a grandiosity complex.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseControlPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Get it over with, will you?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Where does New Vegas get all its electricity?
RESPONSE TEXT: Hoover Dam, of course. A hydroelectric dam?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Where does New Vegas get all its electricity?
RESPONSE TEXT: The NCR had it up and running at 50% capacity within a year of occupying the dam. By treaty, New Vegas receives 5% of its output - more than enough.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Why is the terminal on the North wall off-limits?
RESPONSE TEXT: I recommend following the Securitron's instructions. Its programming is... strict, and I don't have time to change it.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseCasinoPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: You dared come here, after what you did?

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseCasinoPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: What do you think you're going to do? Fight you way up to the penthouse and assassinate me?

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseCasinoPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: You came here to finish what you think you started?

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseCasinoPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: This is nothing compared to what's waiting for you up in the penthouse.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseCasinoPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Vegas will still rise again. Your betrayal won't defeat me!

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseCasinoPissed
RESPONSE TEXT: The Lucky 38 will be your grave. I'll finish what Benny couldn't get right!

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHousePenthousePissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Think you're doing well to have made it this far?

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHousePenthousePissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Your chances of breaking through my defenses, they're... minimal, at best!

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHousePenthousePissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Why are you doing this?

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHousePenthousePissed
RESPONSE TEXT: I would've made you wealthy! You could've helped change the world!

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHousePenthousePissed
RESPONSE TEXT: You're actually going to do this all over again?

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHousePenthousePissed
RESPONSE TEXT: Damn it, will you die already?

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseElevatorAlert
RESPONSE TEXT: Aggressive acts on the casino premises will be met with lethal force. Vacate the premises immediately.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseElevatorAlert
RESPONSE TEXT: Vacate the premises immediately. The casino is off-limits for 24 hours.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseElevatorAlert
RESPONSE TEXT: Vacate the premises immediately. All Securitrons are at a state of high alert.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What do I do next?
RESPONSE TEXT: I won't lie to you. It'll be dangerous.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: Can we get down to business?
RESPONSE TEXT: Oh, by all means - yes. That's refreshing.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: Say you keep control of New Vegas. What happens next?
RESPONSE TEXT: New Vegas is more than a city - it's the remedy to mankind's derailment.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: Say you keep control of New Vegas. What happens next?
RESPONSE TEXT: The city's economy is a blast furnace in which can be forged the steel of a new rail line, running straight to a new horizon.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: Say you keep control of New Vegas. What happens next?
RESPONSE TEXT: What is the NCR? A society of people desperate to experience comfort, ease, luxury... A society of customers.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: Say you keep control of New Vegas. What happens next?
RESPONSE TEXT: With all that money pouring in? Give me 20 years, and I'll reignite the high technology development sectors. 50 years, and I'll have people in orbit.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: Say you keep control of New Vegas. What happens next?
RESPONSE TEXT: 100 years, and my colony ships will be heading for the stars, to search for planets unpolluted by the wrath and folly of a bygone generation.

TOPIC TEXT: GREETING
RESPONSE TEXT: To the elevator, if you please... Stop dragging your feet.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'll be on my way, Mr. House.
RESPONSE TEXT: Disappointing. In the extreme.

TOPIC TEXT: vDialogueMrHouseLastWillTestament
RESPONSE TEXT: I, Robert Edwin House, am deceased. Please approach a Securitron and take one of the printed obituaries.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: A woman named Emily asked me to bug one of your data terminals.
PROMPT: I should let you know that I planted a surveillance device on one of your data terminals.
RESPONSE TEXT: Yes, I know. It was detected immediately and deactivated... let's see... 39.735 seconds after you planted it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: A woman named Emily asked me to bug one of your data terminals.
PROMPT: I should let you know that I planted a surveillance device on one of your data terminals.
RESPONSE TEXT: You thought I wouldn't notice?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: A woman named Emily asked me to bug one of your data terminals.
RESPONSE TEXT: One of the Followers of the Apocalypse, I'm sure. They're curious about me.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: A woman named Emily asked me to bug one of your data terminals.
RESPONSE TEXT: Good luck planting a surveillance device here in the Lucky 38 without my knowing about it.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: In the meantime, you'd rule Vegas as some kind of dictator?
RESPONSE TEXT: I prefer the term "autocrat."

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: In the meantime, you'd rule Vegas as some kind of dictator?
RESPONSE TEXT: I would rule as a chief executive. I would not answer to a board of directors or any other entity.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: In the meantime, you'd rule Vegas as some kind of dictator?
RESPONSE TEXT: Nothing to impede progress. If you want to see the fate of democracies, look out the windows.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: What's to keep you from abusing your power?
RESPONSE TEXT: My judgement.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: What's to keep you from abusing your power?
RESPONSE TEXT: I have no interest in abusing others, just as I have no interest in legislating or otherwise dictating what people do in their private time.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: What's to keep you from abusing your power?
RESPONSE TEXT: Nor have I any interest in being worshipped as some kind of machine god messiah. I am impervious to such corrupting ambitions.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What are your plans for New Vegas?
PROMPT: What's to keep you from abusing your power?
RESPONSE TEXT: But autocracy? Firm control in the hands of a technological and economic visionary? Yes, that Vegas shall have.
Today, with the delivery of the Platinum Chip, all that changes. Behold, for the first time, Securitrons running the Mark II OS!
All together, the Mark II software upgrade confers a 235% increase in combat effectiveness per unit.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What the hell are you?
RESPONSE TEXT: A crude question, crudely asked.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What the hell are you?
RESPONSE TEXT: I'll be happy to satisfy your rambunctious curiosity at a more appropriate moment. But now, I'll repeat my question...

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What the hell are you?
RESPONSE TEXT: What do you make of what you've seen?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
PROMPT: How will the NCR defend Hoover Dam?
RESPONSE TEXT: General Oliver's strategy - or "tunnel vision," as I like to call it - has been to mass troops at Hoover Dam.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
PROMPT: How will the NCR defend Hoover Dam?
RESPONSE TEXT: He wants to out-fight the Legion in a straight-forward slugging match, and then, when they rout, pursue and destroy them in detail.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
PROMPT: How will the NCR defend Hoover Dam?
RESPONSE TEXT: A crushing, decisive victory of this sort would overshadow the tactical ingenuity of Chief Hanlon's defense four years ago, you see.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What should I expect at the dam?
PROMPT: What's your battle plan for the Dam?
RESPONSE TEXT: A good deal should be obvious to you by now. I won't spoil the rest by talking out of turn.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: What's the goal?
RESPONSE TEXT: As I've said, your objective is to install an override module in the control room halfway across the dam. Are you ready perform this task?

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I have some things to take care of before the battle.
RESPONSE TEXT: Then handle them with dispatch. The Legion's assault is imminent.

SPEAKER: MrHouse "Mr. House"
TOPIC TEXT: I'm ready. Let's finish this.
RESPONSE TEXT: We've accomplished a great deal, you and I. One last task, and our work is complete. I'll see you in the control room.
